parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 1500, system: "Extract only the core value proposition text (hero headline, subhead, pricing headline) from the following page text. Remove navigation, testimonials, UI labels, legal text. Return clean text only, no JSON.", messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.text_content || $json.raw_html || "No content" }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 1500, system: "Compare previous and current value proposition text for this company. Identify if there is a meaningful narrative shift. Classify drift direction: Outcome, Control, Speed, Intelligence, Risk, Trust, Platform, Simplicity. Return valid JSON only: {changed: bool, drift_from: string, drift_to: string, drift_direction: string, gtm_implication: string, severity: 1-5}", messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Previous copy:
" + ($json.previous_copy || "N/A") + "

Current copy:
" + ($json.current_copy || "N/A") }] }) }}

={{ { company_id: $json.company_id, week_start_date: $json.week_start_date || "2026-01-26", drift_detected: $json.changed || false, drift_from: $json.drift_from || null, drift_to: $json.drift_to || null, drift_direction: $json.drift_direction || null, scope: "single_company", gtm_implication: $json.gtm_implication || null, severity: $json.severity || 1, raw_llm_response: $json } }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 2000, system: "You are a B2B PMM analyst. Given current messaging for all companies in RevOps/Sales Tech, identify: 1) convergence_signals: which narratives are becoming similar, 2) divergence_signals: which are breaking away, 3) pressure_indicators: what category pressure this indicates. Return valid JSON: {convergence_signals: [...], divergence_signals: [...], pressure_indicators: [...], summary: string}", messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Analyze these company messaging snapshots:\n\n" + ($json.allNarratives || JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => ({company: i.json.company_name, copy: i.json.extracted_copy})))) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 3000, system: 'You are a competitive intelligence analyst building a narrative graph. Use intelligence-grade language: We assess, Indicators suggest, Consistent with. Never state conclusions as facts.

For each drift this week:
1. Does it connect to an existing arc? Look for thematic similarity.
2. If yes: update that arc. If no: create a new arc.
3. Classify the edge: origin (first signal), escalation (intensifies), reinforcement (same repeated), pivot (direction changed).
4. Determine evidence_weight from page type: homepage or pricing = high, product = medium, blog or partners or docs = low.
5. Generate alternative_explanation (counter-hypothesis) for every arc.
6. Compute confidence_level: high (4+ signals, 3+ page types, 4+ weeks), moderate-high (3+ signals, 2+ page types), moderate (2+ signals OR 2+ page types), low (single signal or page type).

Return valid JSON only:
{
  "arc_operations": [
    {
      "operation": "update" or "create",
      "arc_id": "existing UUID or null for create",
      "company_id": "UUID",
      "arc_title": "Campaign title (3-6 words)",
      "arc_theme": "Persistent narrative direction",
      "arc_status": "building|escalating|peaked",
      "trajectory": "accelerating|steady|decelerating",
      "current_severity": 1-5,
      "strategic_summary": "Use intelligence language: We assess... (1-2 sentences)",
      "alternative_explanation": "Plausible counter-hypothesis with evidence for and against (1-2 sentences)",
      "confidence_level": "high|moderate-high|moderate|low",
      "edge": {
        "signal_source": "narrative_drift",
        "source_id": "drift UUID or null",
        "week_start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
        "edge_label": "origin|escalation|reinforcement|pivot",
        "llm_reasoning": "Why this connects (1 sentence)",
        "evidence_weight": "high|medium|low",
        "page_type": "homepage|pricing|product|blog|partners|docs"
      }
    }
  ]
}', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'THIS WEEK DRIFTS:
' + JSON.stringify(($json.this_week_drifts || []).slice(0,20)) + '

EXISTING ACTIVE ARCS:
' + JSON.stringify(($json.existing_arcs || []).slice(0,20)) + '

RECENT DRIFTS (12 weeks):
' + JSON.stringify(($json.recent_drifts || []).slice(0,30)) }] }) }}

={{ (() => { const ops = $json.arc_operations || []; const creates = ops.filter(o => o.operation === 'create'); if (creates.length === 0) return JSON.stringify({skip: true}); const now = new Date().toISOString(); return JSON.stringify(creates.map(op => ({ company_id: op.company_id, arc_title: op.arc_title || 'Untitled Arc', arc_theme: op.arc_theme || '', arc_status: op.arc_status || 'building', first_seen_week: op.edge?.week_start_date || now.slice(0,10), last_seen_week: op.edge?.week_start_date || now.slice(0,10), weeks_active: 1, escalation_count: 1, trajectory: op.trajectory || 'steady', current_severity: op.current_severity || 1, strategic_summary: op.strategic_summary || null, alternative_explanation: op.alternative_explanation || null, confidence_level: op.confidence_level || 'low', corroboration_score: (() => { const pt = new Set(); const edges = (op.edge ? [op.edge] : []); edges.forEach(e => { if(e.page_type) pt.add(e.page_type); }); const numSignals = edges.length; const numPageTypes = pt.size; if (numSignals >= 3 && numPageTypes >= 2) return 'strong'; if (numSignals >= 2 || numPageTypes >= 2) return 'moderate'; return 'weak'; })(), page_type_diversity: (() => { const pt = new Set(); const edges = (op.edge ? [op.edge] : []); edges.forEach(e => { if(e.page_type) pt.add(e.page_type); }); return pt.size || 1; })(), updated_at: now }))); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, system: 'You are a market intelligence analyst. Use intelligence-grade language: We assess, Indicators suggest, Consistent with. Never state conclusions as facts.

Given active narrative arcs across companies, detect if 2+ companies converge on the same narrative theme within 4 weeks.

For each convergence:
1. Determine corroboration_score: strong (3+ arcs across 3+ companies with high-weight signals), moderate (2 arcs or 2+ companies), weak (circumstantial similarity).
2. Generate alternative_explanation: a plausible counter-hypothesis for why the convergence may be coincidental.
3. Determine confidence_level: high, moderate-high, moderate, or low.

Return valid JSON only:
{"convergences": [{"convergence_theme": "Theme", "company_ids": ["uuid1","uuid2"], "arc_ids": ["uuid1","uuid2"], "severity": 1-5, "summary": "Use intelligence language: We assess... (1-2 sentences)", "corroboration_score": "strong|moderate|weak", "alternative_explanation": "Counter-hypothesis (1-2 sentences)", "confidence_level": "high|moderate-high|moderate|low"}]}

If no convergence: {"convergences": []}', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'ACTIVE ARCS:
' + JSON.stringify(($('Merge Arc Context').first().json.existing_arcs || []).slice(0,20)) + '

THIS WEEK OPS:
' + JSON.stringify(($('Build Edge Records').first().json.arc_results || []).slice(0,20)) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ signal_type: 'narrative', severity: 4, confidence: 0.8, title: 'Narrative Graph Update: ' + ($('Parse Arc Operations').first().json.arc_operations || []).length + ' arc(s) processed, ' + ($('Parse Convergence').first().json.count || 0) + ' convergence(s)', summary: 'Weekly narrative graph analysis complete. Campaign arcs and market convergence updated.', source_schema: 'diff_tracker', source_table: 'narrative_arcs', source_id: '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' }) }}
